scripts.stack:up: sh -c 'podman-compose -f podman-compose.yml up --build -d || podman compose -f podman-compose.yml up --build -d'
scripts.stack:down: sh -c 'podman-compose -f podman-compose.yml down || podman compose -f podman-compose.yml down'
scripts.stack:logs: sh -c 'podman-compose -f podman-compose.yml logs -f || podman compose -f podman-compose.yml logs -f'
scripts.stack:restart: npm run stack:down && npm run stack:up
scripts.reset: npm run stack:down && npm run stack:reset-data && npm run stack:up
